programmes.show_name: Easter's Biggest Hits: 1980-1989
programmes.show_description: What was in the top five during the Easter holiday in the '80s? We choose three mega-hits from each year, 1980 to 1989, with Madonna, David Bowie, Bros, The Jam, Culture Club and more!

programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programmes.show_name: Where Did THAT No.1 Come From?!
programmes.show_description: Sixty minutes of novelty hits and terrifying chart toppers - all of them came out of nowhere, and all of them topped the UK charts!

programmes.show_description: From Evelyn Thomas' High Energy in 1984, through Stock Aitken & Waterman and onto the breakout of happy house at the end of the decade, it's Sinitta's dance session - full of bounce!
